eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cottonwood, MN; at 6:15 AM on JUL 15, 2019 Effective until 6:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the IPAWS system. If this was an actual emergency, there would be further instructions listed.
